javax.imageio.stream/ImageOutputStream/w.description:

current byte position.

javax.imageio.stream/ImageOutputStream/w.name: writeUTF
javax.imageio.stream/ImageOutputStream/w.description:

network byte order, followed by themodified UTF-8representation of every character in the strings.
